events.title: 3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp
events.description: Transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp with certified facilitator
events.full_text:
3 Days OSHO Meditation Camp

Dates: 9th October - 12th October 2026
Time: 4pm (start time on 11th) - 4pm (end time on 14th)
Location: Tiruvannamali

Experience a transformative 3-day OSHO meditation camp, starting on 9th October. Guided by certified facilitator Moksha, this retreat offers a deep meditation experience.
